details.question: What was the basic earnings per share (EPS) attributable to common stockholders in 2023?
details.generated:
To find the basic earnings per share (EPS) attributable to common stockholders in 2023, you need to look for the net income attributable to common stockholders and divide it by the weighted-average shares of common stock outstanding for the period. According to the document, the net income attributable to common stockholders in 2023 was $14,999 million. The weighted-average shares of common stock outstanding for the period can be found in the table titled "Reconciliation of net income attributable to common stockholders to net income used in computing basic and diluted net income per share of common stock" under the column labeled "Weighted average shares used in computing net income per share of common stock, basic". The value for 2023 was 3,174 million. Therefore, the basic EPS attributable to common stockholders in 2023 is:

$14,999 million / $3,174 million = $4.71 per share
